title: Golden Brown Chinese Fish Shui Zhu Yu
description: A traditional Dongbei dish featuring crispy onion rings and tender fish, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe combines the flavors of China with a dash-friendly approach.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Dredge the fish fillets in cornstarch, shaking off excess.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the fish from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the onion rings and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
To serve, place the fish in a lacquerware bowl and top with the onion rings and scallions.
